name: wonder
description: Wonder - AI 文献分析与知识管理工具

scripts.dev:electron: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && concurrently "vite" "tsx watch server/index.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run rebuild:electron && electron ."
scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run build:server && vite build && electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.build:installer: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run build:server && vite build && electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:python

author: Bruce Zhao
